ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "roll_number" INTEGER /* Roll number assigned to the student */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the student resides */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student was enrolled */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the student belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., lecture, lab, tutorial) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who took the attendance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "course_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the course (e.g., days and times) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade achieved by the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the grade was achieved */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of the grade (e.g., midterm, final) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who assigned the grade */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or remarks about the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the teacher belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the teacher's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the teacher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher teaching the course */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the course is held */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the course is held */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the course is held */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the course is held */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedule_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedule_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score for the assignment */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of the assignment (e.g., homework, project) */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the assignment */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assignments" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of the submission (e.g., online, paper) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who graded the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assignments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assignments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assignments_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date the exam is held */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score for the exam */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of the exam (e.g., midterm, final) */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the exam */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_exams" (
  "exam_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who graded the exam */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_exams_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_exams_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_exams_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
